subject: biologi
globalRules: Do not commit raw OCR text or long textbook excerpts.
Use private-source://pdfer/biologi/... for private evidence locators.
Do not send private textbook pages, OCR or student data to Firecrawl or external model chains.
Do not mark SourceClaims accepted until evidence_ref, page_record and source_atom are reviewed.
Do not create pixel images before accepted KnowledgePoints and pixel bindings exist.

workItems.reason: Existing tracked page renders, OCR json and margin samples make the repo unsafe as a public handoff source.
Sidkarta and indexering disagree on printed boundaries.
Structural sections exist, but claims remain candidate-only.
